query: SELECT termNumber, titleCn, titleEn, SUBSTRING(contentCn, 1, 100) as contentCn_preview, SUBSTRING(contentEn, 1, 100) as contentEn_preview FROM invoice_terms_templates WHERE contentCn LIKE '%{{%' OR contentEn LIKE '%{{%' ORDER BY termNumber;
